description: Due to land subsidence, the nation of Indonesia is relocating its capital. In the 'field_observations' layer, create a point at Jakarta on the island of Java named 'Jakarta_Old' with the note 'Status: Decommissioned'. Additionally, create a point for the new capital on the eastern side of Borneo (Kalimantan) named 'Nusantara_New' with the note 'Status: Proposed'. Save the updated layer.
